prose: Benzene frontier-orbital calculation: DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), PySCF RKS, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Density fitting OFF (exact four-center ERIs). Geometry: user-supplied benzene.xyz, single-point (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true. HOMO = −7.04683 eV, LUMO = −0.41575 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.63109 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap). HOMO−1/LUMO+1 are essentially degenerate with HOMO/LUMO, reflecting benzene's D6h symmetry (e1g HOMO pair, e2u LUMO pair). Total energy: −232.33724 Eh. CLI: cli.py frontier benzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1. Output: benzene_frontier_dft.json.
